title: corpseorigin
description: Corpse Origin is a Minecraft mod inspired by the web comic "Shen Xiong" (尸兄)/Zombie Brother, designed for Neoforge 1.21.1, introducing a core system of infection, mutation, and evolution.
body:
✨ What does it do?
The story begins with the mysterious Qi Xing Guan (Seven-Star Coffin). When placed in water, it transforms nearby water sources into deadly Corpse Water. Any creature that comes into contact with it will embark on an irreversible path of mutation.

🎯 Why download it?
Deep Infection System
Creatures exposed to Corpse Water progress through stages: Carrier → Onset → Lesion → Transformation. Each stage has distinct effects and varying reversibility.

Dynamic Mutation & Evolution
Entities mutate based on their pre-mutation attributes, last actions, and kill count. Mutants (尸兄) gain Evolution Points by killing and cannibalizing, unlocking two paths: Qi Cultivation (Martial Arts) or Body Forging (Mutation), eventually evolving into powerful Elite units.

Ultimate Boss Challenge
Face the fully implemented final boss, Long You (龙右). Experience his multi-stage combat, intelligent minion management, and the "Shi Yu" (Corpse Domain) infection field.

Environmental Interaction
Mutants use a vibration system to hunt players who make noise. High-ranking mutants can suppress cannibalism among lesser ones, creating simple ecological dynamics.

Skin System
Use the command /summonzb <player_name> to summon mutants wearing specific player skins, adding fun to server gameplay.

⚠️ User Notice & Disclaimer
1. Alpha Version Warning
This is an 0.0.1alpha release. The mod is in very early development. It may contain significant bugs, crashes, or balance issues. Use in test environments or with backed-up worlds only.

2. Current Scope
This version focuses on the core infection, basic mutation, evolution framework, and the Long You boss fight. Planned features like advanced swarm intelligence, rare mutations, and diverse creature variants are not yet implemented.

3. Known Limitation
Currently, only Villagers have a unique mutation (into a basic 尸兄). All other creatures currently mutate into the same basic type. Diversification is planned for future updates.

4. Dependencies
Requires Neoforge 1.21.1.

5. Disclaimer

Corpse Origin is a non-official, fan-made project based on the "Shen Xiong" (尸兄)/Zombie Brother comic.

It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to the original creators, copyright holders, or publishers. All rights to the original characters, settings, and names belong to their respective owners.

This mod contains fictional depictions of violence, body horror, and mutation intended to match the source material's style. All content is fictional.

The original code of this mod is provided under the MIT License. The use of copyrighted elements from the original work is for fan creation purposes only.

THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND. Use at your own risk.
